user.title: Add WLED MQTT Light
user.description:
Configure a WLED device controlled via MQTT.

The **Base Topic** is the root topic you configured in WLED's MQTT settings (e.g. `wled/kitchen`). The integration will automatically derive all sub-topics from it.

data_description.device_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant (e.g. Kitchen WLED)
data_description.mqtt_base_topic: WLED MQTT base topic, e.g. wled/kitchen

abort.already_configured: This WLED MQTT device is already configured.

error.topic_empty: MQTT base topic cannot be empty.

data.presets_raw: Preset List (one per line, format: Name=ID)

data_description.presets_raw:
Enter each preset on its own line as Name=ID, e.g.:
Music Mode=1
Shelves=2
ALL=3
